svg.title: Next development priorities
svg.desc: Three-tier roadmap: critical gaps, high-value features, and future enhancements

g.text: Tier 1 — Critical gaps (fix before wider deployment)

svg.text: Immediate focus: Tier 1 items take 1–2 days each and make the system safe to rely on
Tier 2 items transform it from a monitoring tool into an operational SCADA platform
